v3.2.0 — Now Available

BLite Studio

The official GUI for BLite databases.
Browse, query, and manage your data without writing a single line of code.

Download StudioView on GitHub ↗

Everything you need to explore

A lightweight, native Avalonia app — no Electron, no web runtime.

🔍

Browse Collections

Navigate databases, collections and documents in a clean tree view.

⚡

BLQL Query Editor

Run BLQL queries directly from the UI and inspect results in real time.

✏️

Insert & Edit

Insert new documents and edit existing ones with a built-in BSON editor.

📋

Connection History

Quickly reopen recent databases with saved access settings.

🔒

Read-Only Mode

Open databases in safe read-only mode to prevent accidental writes.

🌐

Cross-Platform

Native builds for Windows, Linux and macOS (Intel & Apple Silicon).

Download Studio

Version 3.2.0 — MIT License — Self-contained, no runtime required.

🪟Windows
⬇Installer (.msi)Recommended⬇Portable (.zip)
🐧Linux
⬇Debian package (.deb)Recommended⬇Archive (.tar.gz)
🍎macOS
⬇Apple Silicon (.dmg)Recommended⬇Intel x64 (.dmg)

All releases and changelogs on GitHub Releases ↗

Powerful built-in query language

Use BLQL directly in Studio to filter, sort and project documents with the same MQL-inspired syntax available in the .NET API.

Read BLQL docs
